ParkPulse — Congestion Impact Map
2534 parking hotspot cells (H3 res-9, ~150 m), Bengaluru. Color = severity 0–100.
Use the layer control (top-right) to switch between impact-weighted and raw violation density — the re-ranking is the point. Click any cell for its score breakdown.
Impact is a transparent engineered index (volume × intensity × exposure × persistence), not a measured value — there is no traffic-flow ground truth in this data.
